prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次约34502→36824→38674→42525→46234，连续5年持续后移，累计后移约11732名；近3年加速后移，年均后移约2500名以上；2025年基准约46234名；本省理科/物理类计划2021年44人、2022年46人、2023年46人、2024年56人、2025年55人；2026年计划69人，较2025年大幅扩招约25.5%，竞争显著加剧，位次后移压力较大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流高校；软科主榜排名从2021年第198名持续上升至2026年第157名，近年排名稳步提升，学校综合实力和认可度有所增强；声誉文件中未见延边大学相关负面或正面舆情事件，学校整体声誉平稳；抖音热度排名第79，评价为一般，综合热度约29.2万，短视频平台关注度处于中等偏下水平，无明显报考热度异常信号；延边大学在第五轮学科评估中无A-及以上等级学科，但作为综合性大学，外国语言文学（朝鲜语方向）为传统特色学科；临床医学、药学等医学类专业有一定实力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 物理类招生专业中，电子信息工程、计算机科学与技术、通信工程等属高热推荐专业，临床医学、麻醉学属推荐专业，机械类、土木建筑、工商管理属明显劝退专业，热门与冷门专业并存；安徽省2026年考生总数451000人，较2025年总考生462179人略有下降，其中物理类考生估算约31.1万人（较2025年32.1万减少约1万人），竞争压力略有缓解；延边大学位于吉林省延边朝鲜族自治州，距安徽省较远，地域偏好对安徽考生吸引力一般；该校在安徽省招生占比约1.5%–2%，属跨省招生中占比偏低的学校。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年计划大幅扩招约25.5%是推动位次后移的最关键因素，但软科排名持续上升、安徽省物理类考生总数略有下降、电子信息/计算机等热门专业招生等因素部分抵消扩招压力；在2025年基准46234名基础上，预计2026年最低位次约53094名，区间52594–53594名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category dropped from approximately 34502 to 36824 to 42525 to 46234, continuously shifting backward for 5 consecutive years, with a cumulative shift of about 11732 places; accelerated backward shift in the last 3 years, with an average annual shift of over 2500 places; the 2025 baseline is approximately 46234; the provincial science/physics enrollment plan was 44 in 2021, 46 in 2022, 46 in 2023, 56 in 2024, and 55 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 69, a significant expansion of about 25.5% compared to 2025, leading to intensified competition and greater pressure for ranking backward shift.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science ranking has steadily risen from 198th in 2021 to 157th in 2026, indicating improving comprehensive strength and recognition; no negative or positive public opinion events related to Yanbian University were found in reputation documents, with overall reputation stable; Douyin popularity ranking is 79th, rated as average, with a comprehensive heat of about 292,000, indicating moderate to low attention on short video platforms and no abnormal signals in application heat; Yanbian University has no A- or above disciplines in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, but as a comprehensive university, foreign language and literature (Korean direction) is a traditional characteristic discipline; clinical medicine, pharmacy, and other medical disciplines have certain strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among the physics category enrollment majors, electronic information engineering, computer science and technology, communication engineering, etc., are high-heat recommended majors; clinical medicine and anesthesiology are recommended majors; mechanical, civil engineering, and business administration are clearly discouraged majors, with both popular and unpopular majors coexisting; the total number of candidates in Anhui Province in 2026 is 451,000, slightly down from 462,179 in 2025, with an estimated 311,000 physics category candidates (a decrease of about 10,000 from 325,000 in 2025), slightly easing competition pressure; Yanbian University is located in Yanbian Korean Autonomous Prefecture, Jilin Province, far from Anhui Province, with general regional appeal to Anhui candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Anhui Province is about 1.5%–2%, which is relatively low among cross-provincial enrollments.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward shift trend in historical rankings and the significant expansion of about 25.5% in the 2026 plan as the most critical factor driving the ranking backward shift, but factors such as the steady rise in Soft Science ranking, a slight decrease in the total number of physics category candidates in Anhui Province, and the enrollment of popular majors like electronic information and computer science partially offset the expansion pressure; based on the 2025 baseline of 46234, the estimated minimum ranking for 2026 is about 53094, with a range of 52594–53594.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 52594–53594, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Communication Engineering, Mathematics, Accounting) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Clinical Medicine, Computer Science and Technology, Electronic Information Engineering) as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors (Civil Engineering, Pharmacy, Food Science and Engineering, etc.) as safety options. When the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range, prioritize Tier 1 popular majors; when the ranking is close to the upper bound, focus on stable Tier 2 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category fluctuated from approximately 7273 → 7743 → 7637 → 7345 → 8500, showing an overall trend of shifting backward, with a single-year shift of about 1155 places in 2025 compared to 2024, the largest single-year shift in the past five years; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 8500; the provincial enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category was 28 in 2021, 30 in 2022, 30 in 2023, 28 in 2024, and 32 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 48, a significant expansion of 50% compared to 2025, leading to intensified competition and greater pressure for ranking decline.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 198th in 2021 to 157th in 2026, showing consistent improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's overall strength and recognition; no negative or positive public opinion incidents related to Yanbian University were found in reputation documents, indicating a stable overall reputation; Douyin popularity ranking is 79th, rated as average, with a comprehensive popularity of about 292,000, indicating a below-average level of attention on short video platforms and no abnormal signals in application popularity; Yanbian University has no A- or above disciplines in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, but as a comprehensive university, foreign language and literature (Korean language direction) is a traditional characteristic discipline, and liberal arts foundational disciplines such as Chinese language and literature and history have certain accumulations.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among history category majors, law is a recommended major (relatively popular), Chinese language and literature is a recommended major, economics is in a wait-and-see differentiation category, and business administration and tourism management are clearly discouraged majors; the estimated number of history category examinees in Anhui Province in 2026 is about 140,000 (slightly down from 141,000 in 2025), easing competition pressure slightly; Yanbian University is located in Yanbian Korean Autonomous Prefecture, Jilin Province, far from Anhui Province, with average regional appeal to Anhui candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Anhui is about 1.5%–2%, a relatively low proportion among cross-provincial enrollments.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the overall trend of ranking fluctuations and the significant 50% expansion in the 2026 plan as the most critical factor driving ranking decline, but factors such as the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking, a slight decrease in the total number of history category examinees in Anhui, and the enrollment of popular majors like law partially offset the expansion pressure; based on the 2025 baseline of 8500, the estimated minimum ranking for 2026 is about 10950, with a range of 10450–11450.

When the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, prioritize sprinting for Law; when the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range, it is advisable to mainly choose stable Tier 2 majors and avoid clearly discouraged majors such as Business Administration and Tourism Management.
